channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Two courts: NCAA's present (Gators!) and future play out 1700 miles apart on the same day
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The final buzzer in San Antonio closed a drama that ended with confetti and Gator chomps — a thrill-a-minute NCAA title for the Florida Gators that reminded us all of what's so good about the games these college athletes play.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: PJ Blue, former Louisville linebacker, dead at 27
item.description: P.J. Blue, a former linebacker who played for the Louisville Cardinals, has died, the school announced in a post on social media Monday. He was 27.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Using therapist, San Jose Sharks winger works on his mental game
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks forward Nikolai Kovalenko earned his first point in nearly a month Monday against the Calgary Flames
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Northwestern University to settle lawsuit over football program hazing allegations
item.description: Northwestern University has agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by students against the school and former head coach Pat Fitzgerald, who alleged hazing incidents took place in the football program, but the settlement does not resolve Fitzgerald's lawsuit against the university.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — EDITOR’S NOTE — This story includes discussion of suicide. If you or someone you know needs help, the national suicide and crisis lifeline in the U.S. is available by calling or texting 988. There is also an online chat at 988lifeline.org.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pegula Ice Arena hosting Frozen Four watch party
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- Penn State athletics announced a Frozen Four watch party Thursday night at the Pegula Ice arena. Penn State hockey plays Boston University Thursday at 8:30 p.m. in the Nittany Lions' first Frozen Four appearance.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Maine sues Trump admin over funding freeze for refusal to keep trans athletes out of women's sports
item.description: Maine filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Agriculture over a funding freeze the agency levied on the state for its refusal to alter its participation policy in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panthers sign Colin Granger, ex-college basketball center, in attempt to make him tight end
item.description: Colin Granger, an ex-college basketball center, has signed with the Carolina Panthers, who will attempt to convert him into an NFL-caliber tight end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani, Betts and World Series champion Dodgers visit Trump at the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rugby fans hold their breath as firemen rescue dangling parachutist
item.description: A French parachutist got stuck on the roof of a stadium that was hosting a rugby match over the weekend. Firemen were seen rushing to help the man.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Cabrera wins 1st golf event since prison release
item.description: Angel Cabrera was back on top of a golf tournament on Sunday. He won a PGA Tour Champions event -- his first since being released from prison.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Guerrero, Blue Jays agree to a $500 million, 14-year deal that starts in 2026, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Vladimir Guerrero Jr. and the Toronto Blue Jays agreed to a $500 million, 14-year contract that starts in 2026, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press, a deal that removes what would have been the biggest star from next offseason’s free-agent market.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mikheyev, Nazar and Knight lead the Blackhawks to a 3-1 win over the Penguins
item.description: Ilya Mikheyev scored twice, Frank Nazar added a goal and Spencer Knight stopped 28 shots as the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game skid with a 3-1 win over the Pittsburgh Penguins on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UConn coach Geno Auriemma's 3-word message to Paige Bueckers in emotional embrace after winning championship
item.description: Paige Bueckers and Geno Auriemma shared an emotional embrace as she came off the court as a UConn Husky for the final time, which ended in a national championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls Head Coach Billy Donovan joins Carmelo Anthony, Sue Bird and others in Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, WGN 9

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Defending national champion South Carolina returns to women's title game with 74-57 rout of Texas
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Dawn Staley has never lost a national championship game in three trips as South Carolina's coach. Part of the key to winning those decisive games? Forgetting about what happened the last time she was there. And this time, that was only a year ago.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Pacers run over Jazz in fourth quarter in 140-112 win
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz hung with the Indiana Pacers for three quarters, trailing by just four points going into the fourth. But Indiana outscored Utah in the final quarter, 42-18 en route to a 140-112 win. The Jazz have lost eight in a row and 18 of its last 19 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Yankees OF Brett Gardner's son died of carbon monoxide poisoning, had 'layer' on organs, officials say
item.description: Carbon monoxide poisoning was the cause of death of the teenage son of former New York Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner, authorities in Costa Rica confirmed Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Investigation into death of former Yankees player's son turns to carbon monoxide: reports
item.description: Investigators in Costa Rica say carbon monoxide may instead be to blame for the death of Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5
